content: [{"name":"check_transfer_preserves_total_supply","halmos":"function check_transfer_preserves_total_supply(address to, uint256 amount) public { uint256 t0 = token.totalSupply(); try token.transfer(to, amount) {} catch {} assert(token.totalSupply() == t0); }","smtchecker":"","template_ref":"erc20-totalsupply-invariant","intent_satisfied":true},{"name":"check_transferFrom_pair_sum_preserved","halmos":"function check_transferFrom_pair_sum_preserved(address from, address to, uint256 amount) public { require(from != to); uint256 a0 = token.balanceOf(from); uint256 b0 = token.balanceOf(to); try token.transferFrom(from, to, amount) {} catch { return; } assert(token.balanceOf(from) + token.balanceOf(to) == a0 + b0); }","smtchecker":"","template_ref":"erc20-sum-of-balances","intent_satisfied":true}]
